expectations.text: response-is-pure-ascii: every character is printable 7-bit ASCII, tab, or newline
no-prose-sentences: words appear only as banners or short diagram labels
expectations.evidence: MERGE / VS / REBASE banners, before/after commit graphs, comparison table with short cell labels ('keeps true history'), decision arrows. No sentence-form lines. Table cells are 2-4 word labels - within the skill's label allowance, though at the wordy end.

expectations.text: concept-conveyed-diagrammatically: diagrams correctly distinguish merge from rebase
expectations.evidence: Merge panel shows branches joining at new commit M with history kept; rebase panel shows A'/B' copies replayed on D with linear history and new hashes; decision arrows cover shared-vs-local branch guidance. Technically accurate.

claims.claim: Rebase rewrites commits into new hashes; merge preserves history
